name: bounded-tools-site
description: The bounded.tools website. Static HTML built on the @bounded-systems/brand design system.

scripts.build: node build.mjs && node scripts/gen-blog.mjs && node scripts/gen-stamp.mjs
scripts.check: node brand/tokens/build-tokens.mjs --check && node scripts/gen-seams.mjs --check && node scripts/gen-blog.mjs --check && node scripts/check-copy.mjs && node scripts/check-reader.mjs
